title: v0.2.5 Adoption Blockers — Changelog + Test Coverage
overview: Fix the two blockers preventing adoption: (1) restructure the README changelog so version history is clear, and (2) add integration tests for 7 v0.2.x features that shipped with zero test coverage (screenshot-diff, find, state save/load/list/show, auth login flow, drag, download, route block/fulfill/clear).
scopeChallenge: README is not outdated — only the changelog section needs restructuring. Of the 11 features the user listed as untested, 4 are already tested (offline, HAR, policy, domain filter WS/Beacon). True gap is 7 features. HOLD mode: reuse existing test patterns, create new test files to avoid file conflicts for parallel execution.

failureModes.mitigation: Use high threshold for same-page comparison; compare same page to itself, not stored baseline
Use unique /tmp/browse-test-state-{timestamp} dirs with afterAll cleanup

failureModes.risk: Auth login form submission navigates away
failureModes.mitigation: login.html form has no action — submission stays on same domain
Explicit afterAll cleanup of temp download path
Call route clear in afterAll; use dedicated BrowserManager instance
Each test file creates its own BrowserManager instance

testCoverageMap.codepath: decodePNG() — PNG parsing, filter types, RGBA output
screenshot-diff command — baseline, threshold, output format
state list — directory listing with metadata
route block — request interception and abort
route fulfill — request mocking with custom response

tasks.title: Add download endpoint to test server
tasks.description: Add a /download/test.txt route to test/test-server.ts that returns a small file with Content-Disposition: attachment header. Also create test/fixtures/download-link.html with a link that triggers the download. This enables the download command test in TASK-007.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /download/test.txt returns response with Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="test.txt" and body "test file content"
GET /download-link.html serves an HTML page with Download
Existing test-server routes still work (no regression)

tasks.title: README changelog restructure
tasks.description: Restructure the 'Added beyond gstack' section (README.md:336-373) into a proper versioned changelog. Replace the flat bullet list with version headers (v0.1.0, v0.2.0) and group features into categories (Commands, Security, DX, Infrastructure). Keep the Acknowledgments paragraph about gstack.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Added beyond gstack' section replaced with '## Changelog' with version subheaders
Each version lists features grouped by category (not a flat list)
No content lost — all features from the original list appear in the new structure

tasks.title: Screenshot-diff unit + integration tests
tasks.description: Create test/screenshot-diff.test.ts with: (1) decodePNG unit tests — decode a real Playwright screenshot, verify width/height/RGBA data. (2) compareScreenshots unit tests — identical PNGs pass, different PNGs fail, verify mismatch percentage. (3) screenshot-diff command integration — take baseline via handleMetaCommand('screenshot'), then compare via handleMetaCommand('screenshot-diff'). Uses src/png-compare.ts and src/commands/meta.ts:483-533. Follow the BrowserManager + startTestServer test pattern from test/features.test.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: decodePNG correctly parses a Playwright-generated PNG and returns valid width, height, and RGBA data buffer
compareScreenshots returns passed: true with mismatchPct: 0 when comparing a screenshot against itself
compareScreenshots returns passed: false when comparing screenshots of different pages
screenshot-diff command output contains 'Pixels:', 'Mismatch:', 'Result: PASS' or 'Result: FAIL'
screenshot-diff with --threshold flag respects custom threshold
screenshot-diff with missing baseline throws error

tasks.title: Find command tests
tasks.description: Create test/find.test.ts with tests for all 5 find subtypes (role, text, label, placeholder, testid). Use existing fixtures: basic.html (has data-testid='main-content', headings, links) and forms.html (has labeled inputs, placeholders). Tests cover src/commands/meta.ts:625-664. Follow the BrowserManager + startTestServer pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: find role heading returns count >= 1 on basic.html
find text 'Hello World' returns count of 1 and includes the text content
find label on forms.html returns matches for labeled inputs
find placeholder on forms.html returns matches
find testid main-content returns count of 1 on basic.html
find invalid-type query throws 'Unknown find type' error

tasks.title: State save/load/list/show tests
tasks.description: Create test/state.test.ts with tests for all 4 state subcommands. Override LOCAL_DIR to a temp directory to avoid polluting the project. Tests cover src/commands/meta.ts:132-215. Test flow: navigate to page with cookies/storage → state save → state list → state show → clear context → state load → verify restored. Follow the BrowserManager + startTestServer pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: state save creates a JSON file in the states directory containing cookies and localStorage
state list shows saved state names with file size and timestamp
state show displays cookie count, origin count, and storage item count
state load restores cookies into the browser context (verified by reading cookies after load)
state list with no saved states returns '(no saved states)'
state show with non-existent name throws 'State file not found'

tasks.title: Auth login flow integration test
tasks.description: Create test/auth-login.test.ts with tests for the auth login flow. Use existing test/fixtures/login.html (has email + password + submit). Save credentials pointing to test server's login.html, then call vault.login(name, bm) and verify auto-detection found the right selectors and filled the form. Tests src/auth-vault.ts:137-162 and autoDetectSelector at :196-243. Follow the BrowserManager + startTestServer pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: auth save + auth login navigates to login URL, fills username/password via auto-detection, and clicks submit
Auto-detect finds input[type='email'] for username and input[type='password'] for password
Login returns 'Logged in as <username>' message
auth login with non-existent credential throws 'not found' error

tasks.title: Drag and download command tests
tasks.description: Create test/drag-download.test.ts with: (1) Drag tests using existing interactions.html fixture (#drag-src, #drag-tgt at line 15-16). Tests src/commands/write.ts:363-372. (2) Download tests using download-link.html fixture from TASK-001. Tests src/commands/write.ts:400-412. Cleanup downloaded files in afterAll.
acceptanceCriteria: drag #drag-src #drag-tgt returns 'Dragged #drag-src to #drag-tgt' without error
drag with missing args throws 'Usage: browse drag' error
download #dl-link /tmp/browse-test-dl.txt saves file and returns 'Downloaded: ...'
Downloaded file content matches expected ('test file content')
Cleanup removes temp download file after test

tasks.title: Route block/fulfill/clear tests
tasks.description: Create test/route.test.ts with tests for all 3 route actions. Tests src/commands/write.ts:430-470. (1) route block: set up a block pattern, verify matching request fails via page.evaluate(fetch). (2) route fulfill: mock a URL pattern with custom status/body, verify response. (3) route clear: remove routes, verify normal behavior restored. Call route clear in afterAll to prevent state leaks.
acceptanceCriteria: route <pattern> block prevents matching requests (verified via failed fetch in page context)
route <pattern> fulfill 200 'mocked body' returns custom response for matching requests
route clear removes all custom routes and restores normal request behavior
Route output messages contain pattern and action ('Blocking requests matching:', 'Mocking requests matching:')
route with no args throws usage error

tasks.title: Full test suite verification
tasks.description: Run bun test to verify all new and existing tests pass together. Fix any failures, conflicts, or shared state leaks between test files.
acceptanceCriteria: bun test exits with code 0
All existing tests in commands.test.ts, snapshot.test.ts, sessions.test.ts, session-e2e.test.ts, features.test.ts, interactions.test.ts still pass
All new test files pass
No test file conflicts or shared state leaks
